comments.text: Put aside from all the propaganda from the west, China is the complete opposite from how it was portrayed in the western hypocrisy. It’s probably the cleanest, safest, & futuristic country in the world. After the visited, their history & culture will educated and fascinated you, the infrastructure & sceneries will astonished & mesmerized you, and their foods and technology will spoiled and shock you. And After all that, the visit is certainly a steal when it comes to your pocket, everything is super affordable.

replies.author: @TopTravelParadise
replies.text:
Hi, thank you so much! You’re welcome to share the YouTube link of the video on Chinese social media. However, please do not download or re-upload the video, as it is property of my channel and protected by copyright. Sharing through the original YouTube link would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for understanding!

你好，非常感谢！你可以在中国的社交媒体上分享这个视频的 YouTube 链接。 但请不要下载或重新上传该视频，因为这是我频道的作品，受版权保护。 如果能通过原始 YouTube 链接分享，我将非常感谢。感谢你的理解！

comments.text: "China looks absolutely surreal and futuristic in this stunning 4K guide! 🏔️✨ From the breathtaking floating peaks of Zhangjiajie that inspired Avatar to the incredible modern architecture of the Ruyi Bridge, it feels like stepping straight into a fantasy world. comments.author: @idofdm7625
comments.text: Even as an American of Chinese heritage, I'm still trying to learn more about my ancestral land and culture as an 65 years old, I finally realized a sample like this barely scratch the surface of China's diverse land scapes and local cultures, imagine the whole of South East Asia, or Europe is one country, that's what you experience traveling across this vast landscape that is a Continental size.

replies.author: @andrewlee4809
replies.text: Unlike the rest of Southeast Asia, China features a gradual transition from the plateau known as the "roof of the world" down to the coastal shores, resulting in an extremely diverse range of landforms. Have you ever been to China?

replies.author: @yonogu
replies.text: 整个东南亚或者欧洲都不及中国的地貌多样性。。东南亚和欧洲没有海拔5000米以上的高原和广袤的沙漠戈壁

comments.author: @frank-js9nf
comments.text: 800年前的中国元朝时期，中国版图超过2300万平方公里，那时候佛尔加河以西的小小莫斯科公国曾经是中国附属国，远东和西伯利亚曾经都是中国领土

replies.author: @周晓伟-u2f
replies.text: 你这不就是用结果论证事实吗。假如日本人征服了中国，你又要以日本侵略东南亚的历史为荣了是吗，你认为是你的荣耀。

replies.author: @leiliu4895
replies.text: ​@艾弦我表达了两个意思，一是外族统治了中国，二是作为汉人，对大屠杀和残暴反感，所以对那两个时期不以为荣不以为荣。你哪个都没有否定，因为这是事实。

replies.author: @艾弦
replies.text: @leiliu4895 蒙古国的人口不及内蒙古蒙古族十分之一

replies.author: @艾弦
replies.text: @leiliu4895 现在所有的满族和大部分蒙古族都是中华民族之一，还在蒙据清据呢，照你这么定义，现在东北是汉据，台湾是汉据，新加坡是汉据

replies.author: @leiliu4895
replies.text: 那不是中国，元朝和清朝，现在更愿意叫“蒙据”和“清据”时期。作为汉人，我个人不以此阶段的任何事物为自豪。

replies.author: @andrewlee4809
replies.text: 你的理解是不對的，蒙古帝國分裂後，其中的一支勢力，忽必烈滅了宋，建立了元。

replies.author: @junq8440
replies.text: 那是蒙古人的国家。别搞错了。何况你说的是金帐汗国，不是元朝。

replies.author: @pogameguy
replies.text: 元朝跟蒙古帝国是不一样的

replies.author: @abrozzoag2107
replies.text: 你们西方人为什么都去看那些城市，一堆钢筋混凝土有啥可看的。我们中国人旅游都是去那些自然景色美丽和有古老文化的地方，比如新疆，西藏，山西等等，节假日我们都在逃离大城市😊

replies.author: @truth8307

comments.author: @samvan7787
comments.text:
The answers are simple:
1. China offers a lot of travel choices: history, scenery, natural wonder, big cities and high tech.
2. The food is great and the variety of food is even better
3. Transportation is so easy, quick and affordable
4. People are genuinely friendly and helpful
5. Do you need more ...   lol
